siteMeta.description: Premium general contracting and remodeling services.

hero.headline: Expert Craftsmanship For Your Home.
hero.subheadline: From custom remodels to seamless room additions, we deliver high-quality construction on time, on budget, and beyond expectations.

servicesBento.title: Custom Room Framing & Dividers
servicesBento.description: Need to split a large room? We build seamless 12x12 divider walls, fully finished, textured, and ready for paint.

servicesBento.title: Kitchen & Bath Remodels
servicesBento.description: Complete transformations with premium finishes, modern layouts, and meticulous attention to detail.

servicesBento.title: Drywall & Finishing
servicesBento.description: Flawless drywall installation, patching, taping, and texturing for a perfect, paint-ready surface.

servicesBento.title: ADUs & Additions
servicesBento.description: Expand your footprint with fully permitted accessory dwelling units and structural home extensions.

about.heading: Cupertino's Trusted Building Partner
about.bioText: We understand that inviting a contractor into your home requires absolute trust. We specialize in projects of all sizes—from framing out a simple room divider to executing full-scale renovations. Our commitment is simple: clear communication, transparent pricing, and craftsmanship that stands the test of time.

testimonials.name: Sarah T.
testimonials.text: They framed out a new divider wall in our living room and the finish was flawless. They left the house cleaner than they found it!

testimonials.name: Michael R.
testimonials.text: Oakhaven completely transformed our outdated kitchen. Their attention to detail on the tile work and custom cabinets was incredible.

testimonials.name: David L.
testimonials.text: Finally, a contractor who actually answers the phone and shows up exactly when they say they will. Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Elena M.
testimonials.text: We hired them for a massive ADU project. They navigated the city permits effortlessly and delivered a beautiful final product.

testimonials.name: James K.
testimonials.text: Professional, polite, and precise. The drywall patching they did is completely invisible. I won't hire anyone else for my home.

trustBanner.heading: Proudly serving the South Bay for over 10 years
